patterns.description: Ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
selector: input[title="Select all rows in this table"]
patterns.selectorKey: input[title="Select all rows in this table"]
patterns.html: <input type="checkbox" class="form-checkbox form-boolean form-boolean--type-checkbox" title="Select all rows in this table">
patterns.failureSummary:
Fix all of the following:
  Only title used to generate label for form element

drupalFix.summary: "Select all rows" checkbox is labeled only by its title attribute
drupalFix.expected: Checkbox has a visible or visually-hidden <label>, or aria-label
drupalFix.actual: input[title="Select all rows in this table"] — title is the sole label source
drupalFix.fix:
Replace the title-only label with aria-label:

<!-- Before (broken) -->
<input type="checkbox" title="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">

<!-- After (fixed) -->
<input type="checkbox"
  aria-label="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">

patterns.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
patterns.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.84 (foreground color: #999999, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

drupalFix.summary: "No blocks in this region" placeholder text fails contrast (2.84:1, needs 4.5:1)
drupalFix.expected: Foreground color #767676 or darker on white (#ffffff) background → 4.54:1

patterns.description: Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space
patterns.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Target has insufficient size (102.3px by 14px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 17.6px instead of at least 24px.

drupalFix.summary: Breadcrumb links are only 14px tall — WCAG 2.5.8 requires 24×24px minimum
drupalFix.expected: Clickable area ≥ 24×24px (WCAG 2.5.8 AA)
drupalFix.actual: Breadcrumb links: 14px height, insufficient spacing from neighbours

it labels: {# Before #}

drupalFix.summary: Homepage has no <h1> heading — screen reader users cannot identify page topic
drupalFix.expected: Every page contains exactly one <h1> that identifies the page
drupalFix.actual: Olivero front page renders no <h1>; the site name in the header is not an <h1>

patterns.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
patterns.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Heading order invalid

drupalFix.summary: Admin Configuration page has heading-order violations (h3 appears before h2)
drupalFix.expected: Heading levels increment by one: h1 → h2 → h3
drupalFix.actual: Panel titles use <h3> but their section headings may be absent or at wrong level
drupalFix.fix:
Audit the heading hierarchy on /admin/config and adjust panel titles: {# system-admin-index.html.twig — ensure section uses h2, panel uses h3 #}

{{ section.title }}

{{ panel.title }}
